narrative_text: Meet Barnaby, a tiny crab with a giant dream, standing on the shimmering sands of a hidden tropical beach. Beside him, a magical message in a bottle has just washed ashore, and he's ready for a big adventure!
branch_summary: Help Barnaby the crab discover a secret message on a glowing tropical beach.
scene_description: A vibrant, sun-drenched tropical shoreline at low tide. The scene is bathed in warm, golden afternoon light that creates sparkling reflections on the wet sand. The composition follows a wide horizontal view of the coast, with a peaceful and curious mood. The color palette features brilliant turquoises, warm sandy ambers, and pops of coral pink.
background_description: A pristine shoreline where crystal-clear turquoise water meets wet, glistening amber sand. In the distance, a soft tropical haze blurs the horizon under a pale citrus-yellow sky with a few wispy, peach-colored clouds.

properties.color: bright sunset-orange with creamy white speckles on his shell
properties.texture: glossy and hard-shelled with tiny fuzzy hairs on his legs
properties.distinctive_features: one oversized left claw wearing a tiny, hand-knitted blue striped leg-warmer

entities.pose: standing high on all six legs, large claw raised open, small claw touching his chin in a thinking gesture

properties.color: translucent sea-glass green with a weathered matte finish
properties.size: medium, slightly longer than the crab
properties.texture: smooth but pitted with small sandy scratches
properties.pattern: solid with a swirling internal glass texture
properties.distinctive_features: corked with a weathered wooden stopper and containing a tightly rolled parchment tied with a crimson ribbon

entities.pose: lying horizontally on its side, partially buried in a small mound of damp sand

properties.color: dusty tan trunk with vibrant lime-green fronds
properties.texture: rough, segmented bark like a braid
properties.distinctive_features: a single cluster of three heavy, hairy brown coconuts hanging from the center

entities.pose: leaning drastically toward the center of the canvas with long green leaves drooping downward
